languages.text:
The user makes a melee attack against all enemies within a 4-cell radius.
The user suffers {uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73} levels of bleeding and immediately suffers an additional instance of damage from this effect.

The user makes a melee attack against all enemies within a 4-cell radius.
At the end of their turn, the user suffers the {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g} effect.
The user suffers +{uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73} levels of bleeding and immediately suffers an additional instance of damage from this effect.

The user makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} against all enemies within a 4-cell radius.
At the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user suffers the {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g} effect.
The user suffers +{uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} and immediately suffers an additional instance of damage from this effect.

The user makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} against all enemies within a 4-cell radius.
At the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user suffers the {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g} effect.
The user suffers +{uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} and immediately suffers an additional instance of damage from this effect.

languages.text:
Обладатель аугмента совершает атаку в {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ближнем бою{/g} против всех противников в радиусе 4 клеток.
На обладателя аугмента накладывается кровотечение ({uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73}), и он немедленно получает внеочередной урон от этого эффекта.
languages.original_text:
The user makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} against all enemies within a 4-cell radius.
The user suffers {uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73} levels of bleeding and immediately suffers an additional instance of damage from this effect.

traits.locale_text:
Обладатель аугмента совершает атаку в ближнем бою против всех противников в радиусе 4 клеток.
На обладателя аугмента накладывается кровотечение ({uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73}), и он немедленно получает внеочередной урон от этого эффекта.

Обладатель аугмента совершает атаку в ближнем бою против всех противников в радиусе 4 клеток.
На обладателя аугмента накладывается кровотечение ({uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73}), и он немедленно получает внеочередной урон от этого эффекта.

languages.text:
L'utilisateur lance une {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}attaque de mêlée{/g} contre tous les ennemis se trouvant dans un rayon de 4 cases.
Il souffre de {uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73} niveaux de Saignement et subit immédiatement une instance supplémentaire de dégâts de cet effet.
languages.original_text:
The user makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} against all enemies within a 4-cell radius.
The user suffers {uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73} levels of bleeding and immediately suffers an additional instance of damage from this effect.

traits.locale_text:
L'utilisateur lance une {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}attaque de mêlée{/g} contre tous les ennemis se trouvant dans un rayon de 4 cases.
Il souffre de {uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73} niveaux de Saignement et subit immédiatement une instance supplémentaire de dégâts de cet effet.

languages.text:
Kullanıcı, 4 hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan tüm düşmanlara {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş saldırısı{/g} gerçekleştirir.
Kullanıcı, {uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73} seviye kanamaya uğrar ve anında bu etkiden ilave bir hasar silsilesine maruz kalır.
languages.original_text:
The user makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} against all enemies within a 4-cell radius.
The user suffers {uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73} levels of bleeding and immediately suffers an additional instance of damage from this effect.

traits.locale_text:
Kullanıcı, 4 hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan tüm düşmanlara {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}yakın dövüş saldırısı{/g} gerçekleştirir.
Kullanıcı, {uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73} seviye kanamaya uğrar ve anında bu etkiden ilave bir hasar silsilesine maruz kalır.

languages.text:
使用者对周围4格内的所有敌人发动一次{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战攻击{/g}。
使用者会受到{uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73}级流血，并立即额外承受一次该效果的伤害。
languages.original_text:
The user makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} against all enemies within a 4-cell radius.
The user suffers {uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73} levels of bleeding and immediately suffers an additional instance of damage from this effect.

traits.locale_text:
使用者对周围4格内的所有敌人发动一次{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近战攻击{/g}。
使用者会受到{uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73}级流血，并立即额外承受一次该效果的伤害。

languages.text:
El usuario efectúa un {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ataque cuerpo a cuerpo{/g} contra todos los enemigos situados en un radio de 4 casillas.
El usuario recibe {uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73} niveles de sangrado y sufre de inmediato una aplicación adicional del daño causado por este efecto.
languages.original_text:
The user makes a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} against all enemies within a 4-cell radius.
The user suffers {uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73} levels of bleeding and immediately suffers an additional instance of damage from this effect.

traits.locale_text:
El usuario efectúa un {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ataque cuerpo a cuerpo{/g} contra todos los enemigos situados en un radio de 4 casillas.
El usuario recibe {uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73} niveles de sangrado y sufre de inmediato una aplicación adicional del daño causado por este efecto.

languages.text:
Der Nutzer macht einen {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}Nahkampfangriff{/g} auf alle Gegner in einem Radius von 4 Feldern.
Der Nutzer erleidet {uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73} Stufen Bluten und eine sofortige zusätzliche Schadensinstanz durch diesen Effekt.
languages.original_text:

The user suffers {uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73} levels of bleeding and immediately suffers an additional instance of damage from this effect.

traits.locale_text:

languages.text:
使用者は半径4マス以内のすべての敵に{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近接攻撃{/g}を行う。
使用者は出血を{uip|bleed|02c674fff8f34bc3a880d726638a4a73}レベル受け、この効果によるダメージを直ちに追加で1回受ける。
